untranslatable_reason: Signal requires direct measurement of 'historical volatility movement by X% over Y days' and comparison of historical vs implied volatility directional alignment, which cannot be precisely expressed using only the allowed indicators. hvol_20 (20-day historical volatility) and india_vix (implied volatility proxy) are available but the thresholds [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] are undefined placeholders. The signal also requires tracking volatility direction confirmation over consecutive days and implied volatility reaching a percentage of historical volatility movement—both requiring custom volatility comparison logic not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses hvol_20 as historical volatility proxy and india_vix as implied volatility proxy, but the core logic of 'historical vol predicts implied vol' requires comparative analysis not directly supported by allowed indicators. The [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] parameters throughout the original signal are undefined and prevent concrete rule construction. Position sizing should be capped at 33% per parameters.
